title: 1.1: Tests that TCPSession correctly reassembles HTTP chunked transfer encoding with binary image data across TCP segments
1.2: Tests that the reassembled HTTP chunked image response contains complete payload data
1.3: Tests that HTTPRequest fields are correctly parsed from chunked transfer pcap
1.4: Tests that TCPSession correctly parses HTTP response with Content-Length header
1.5: Tests that Content-Length value matches the actual payload length in HTTP response
1.6: Tests that TCP PSH flag handling correctly reassembles split HTTP headers
1.7: Tests that split HTTP headers are correctly reassembled into complete header fields
1.8: Tests that HTTP chunked transfer encoding with gzip compression is handled correctly
1.9: Tests that gzip compressed chunked data can be decompressed to original content
2.1: Places all TCPSession HTTP integration tests in the HTTP layer test file (test/scapy/layers/http.uts)
3.1: All tests use Scapy's UTScapy test framework with = test header syntax
3.2: All tests follow the naming pattern with descriptive test names
3.3: All tests use assert statements for verification
4.1: All tests use TCPSession for HTTP stream reassembly
